content: Investigation Summary: Victim Anjali Verma reported rape on 14.10.2023. CCTV at parking lot was offline during critical window. Forensic DNA matches accused Rohan Kapoor. Alibi provided via Café Zenith receipt, but POS logs prove receipt was forged. Deleted call log recovered — 47-second call from Rohan to victim at 9:45 PM, unexplained. Witness Mrs. Mehta’s testimony contradicted by security guard’s log — she was not on balcony. Victim’s roommate confirms victim had gardening injury earlier. Medical report confirms assault. Digital forensics places Rohan at scene between 10:15–10:25 PM. Arjun Singh admitted to altering receipt under pressure from Rohan. Victim’s statement about blue jacket inconsistent with police report — she later disclosed to counselor she was wearing blue jacket herself. This may have caused confusion. Conclusion: Sufficient evidence to charge Rohan Kapoor under Section 376 IPC. Arjun Singh is under investigation for tampering with evidence. Case is complex due to conflicting testimonies and influence from both families. Recommend prosecution.
